entries.sentence: We need an experienced guide for the mountain walk.
entries.chinese: experienced = 有经验的；这次山间徒步需要一位有经验的向导。

entries.sentence: Her explanation made the difficult rule easy to understand.
entries.chinese: explanation = 解释；她的解释让这条复杂的规则变得容易理解。

entries.sentence: This story is fiction, but it feels realistic.
entries.chinese: fiction = 虚构故事；这个故事是虚构的，但感觉很真实。

entries.sentence: Cycling to school has improved my fitness.
entries.chinese: fitness = 体能；骑自行车上学提高了我的体能。

entries.sentence: Their friendship began on the first day of school.
entries.chinese: friendship = 友谊；他们的友谊始于开学第一天。

entries.sentence: People of my grandparents' generation wrote more letters.
entries.chinese: generation = 一代人；我祖父母那一代人写更多书信。

entries.sentence: I took a quick glance at the timetable.
entries.chinese: glance = 一瞥；我快速看了一眼时间表。

entries.sentence: Her family came to the graduation ceremony.
entries.chinese: graduation = 毕业典礼；她的家人来参加毕业典礼。

entries.sentence: Spending time with friends brings me happiness.
entries.chinese: happiness = 快乐；和朋友共度时光给我带来快乐。

entries.sentence: You must show identification before entering the building.
entries.chinese: identification = 身份证明；进入大楼前必须出示身份证明。

entries.sentence: He missed two weeks of school because of an illness.
entries.chinese: illness = 疾病；他因为生病缺了两周课。

entries.sentence: The museum has an exhibition about immigration to the city.
entries.chinese: immigration = 移民；博物馆有一个关于移民来到这座城市的展览。

entries.sentence: The coach explained the importance of regular practice.
entries.chinese: importance = 重要性；教练解释了定期训练的重要性。

entries.sentence: There has been a clear improvement in her pronunciation.
entries.chinese: improvement = 进步；她的发音有了明显进步。

entries.sentence: Book your tickets in advance to get a lower price.
entries.chinese: in advance = 提前；提前订票可以获得更低的价格。

entries.sentence: Take an umbrella in case it rains later.
entries.chinese: in case = 以防；带把伞，以防稍后下雨。

entries.sentence: Music has a strong influence on his paintings.
entries.chinese: influence = 影响；音乐对他的绘画有很大影响。

entries.sentence: The website provides useful information about the course.
entries.chinese: information = 信息；这个网站提供有关课程的实用信息。

entries.sentence: For instance, you could travel by train instead.
entries.chinese: instance = 例子；例如，你可以改乘火车。

entries.sentence: Read the instructions before using the machine.
entries.chinese: instructions = 使用说明；使用机器前请阅读说明。

entries.sentence: The piano was the first instrument she learned to play.
entries.chinese: instrument = 乐器；钢琴是她学会演奏的第一种乐器。

entries.sentence: The book begins with a short introduction to the subject.
entries.chinese: introduction = 导论；这本书以一段简短的主题导论开篇。

entries.sentence: The bicycle was an important invention.
entries.chinese: invention = 发明；自行车是一项重要发明。

entries.sentence: I received an invitation to Maya's birthday party.
entries.chinese: invitation = 邀请函；我收到了玛雅生日聚会的邀请函。

entries.sentence: The restaurant has a licence to serve food outdoors.
entries.chinese: licence = 许可证；这家餐厅有在户外供应食物的许可证。

entries.sentence: We discussed the matter after class.
entries.chinese: matter = 事情；我们课后讨论了这件事。

entries.sentence: Gym membership costs twenty pounds a month.
entries.chinese: membership = 会员资格；健身房会员资格每月收费二十英镑。

entries.sentence: This method makes new words easier to remember.
entries.chinese: method = 方法；这种方法让新单词更容易记住。

entries.sentence: Please wait a moment while I check your booking.
entries.chinese: moment = 片刻；请稍等片刻，我查看一下你的预订。

entries.sentence: The monument was built to remember local soldiers.
entries.chinese: monument = 纪念碑；这座纪念碑是为纪念当地士兵而建的。

entries.sentence: The form asks for your name and nationality.
entries.chinese: nationality = 国籍；表格要求填写你的姓名和国籍。

entries.sentence: Please write your occupation on the application form.
entries.chinese: occupation = 职业；请在申请表上填写你的职业。

entries.sentence: My grandfather is recovering after his knee operation.
entries.chinese: operation = 手术；我祖父做完膝盖手术后正在康复。

entries.sentence: The school trip gave us an opportunity to practise French.
entries.chinese: opportunity = 机会；学校旅行给了我们练习法语的机会。

entries.sentence: Taking the early train is our best option.
entries.chinese: option = 选择；乘早班火车是我们最好的选择。

entries.sentence: She works for an organisation that protects wildlife.
entries.chinese: organisation = 组织；她为一个保护野生动物的组织工作。

entries.sentence: Keep your bicycle off the pavement.
entries.chinese: pavement = 人行道；不要在人行道上骑自行车。

entries.sentence: The postcard cost ninety pence.
entries.chinese: pence = 便士；这张明信片售价九十便士。

entries.sentence: The audience enjoyed the band's final performance.
entries.chinese: performance = 演出；观众很喜欢乐队的最后一场演出。

entries.sentence: It is a pity that you cannot come with us.
entries.chinese: pity = 遗憾；你不能和我们一起来，真遗憾。

entries.sentence: The town has a population of about twenty thousand.
entries.chinese: population = 人口；这个镇大约有两万人口。

entries.sentence: Move the chair into a more comfortable position.
entries.chinese: position = 位置；把椅子移到一个更舒适的位置。

entries.sentence: There is a possibility that the flight will be delayed.
entries.chinese: possibility = 可能性；航班有可能延误。

entries.sentence: The storm left the village without power.
entries.chinese: power = 电力；暴风雨导致村庄停电。

entries.sentence: Good preparation helped us finish the project on time.
entries.chinese: preparation = 准备；充分的准备帮助我们按时完成项目。

entries.sentence: The doctor gave me a prescription for some medicine.
entries.chinese: prescription = 处方；医生给我开了一张药物处方。

entries.sentence: Nina gave a presentation about climate change.
entries.chinese: presentation = 演讲；尼娜做了一场关于气候变化的演讲。

entries.sentence: The factory increased its production of bicycles.
entries.chinese: production = 产量；这家工厂提高了自行车产量。

entries.sentence: A teaching qualification is required for this job.
entries.chinese: qualification = 资格证书；这份工作要求具备教师资格证书。

entries.sentence: The quality of the food was excellent.
entries.chinese: quality = 质量；食物的质量非常好。
